2026-04-17T06:42:35.5654338Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5655527Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5656533Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5657150Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5657665Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5658055Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5658310Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5658604Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5658872Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5659262Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5659604Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5660085Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T06:42:35.5660520Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-17T06:45:46.6038323Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T06:45:31.582224253Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.Dns`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/`\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #58203) by @ArthurMa1978\n\n## What Changed\n\nRelease prep stamped version 1.2.0-beta.3, which includes a `SystemData` deserialization bug fix and dependency upgrades. The 1.2.0-beta.1 release (now shipping as beta.3) added several new resource types — `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, `DnsDSRecord`, `DnssecConfig`, and `SigningKeys` on `DnsZoneData` — none of which are documented in the README.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- The `## Next steps` section in `README.md` links to a personal user fork (`dvbb`) rather than the official `Azure/azure-sdk-for-net` repository — both links are broken and will 404 for external users\n- The actual local samples (`Sample2_ManagingPtrRecord.md`) are mislinked: the README says `Sample2_ManagingRecordSetPtrs.md` (wrong filename) and wrong base URL\n- No README documentation or code snippets for the new `DnssecConfig` resource (DNSSEC configuration) introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\n- No README documentation or code snippets for `DnsNaptrRecord`, `DnsTlsaRecord`, or `DnsDSRecord` record types introduced in 1.2.0-beta.1\n- No test-backed sample file in `tests/Samples/` for DNSSEC workflows or the new record types\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n#### Fix broken links in README\n\n**File:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/README.md`\n**Action:** Edit\n\nReplace the broken `## Next steps` sample links. The links currently point to `dvbb`'s fork with an incorrect filename. Change them to point to the official repository and correct filenames:\n\n```markdown\n### More sample code\n\n- [Managing DNS Zones](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/samples/Sample1_ManagingDNSZones.md)\n- [Managing PTR Record Sets](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/samples/Sample2_ManagingPtrRecord.md)\n```\n\n#### Add DNSSEC section to README\n\n**File:** `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/README.md`\n**Action:** Edit — insert after the `### Delete a Dns zone` example and before `## Troubleshooting`\n\n```markdown\n### Enable DNSSEC on a DNS zone\n\n```C# Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\nArmClient armClient = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await armClient.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\nstring rgName = \"myRgName\";\nResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(rgName);\nDnsZoneCollection dnsZoneCollection = resourceGroup.GetDnsZones();\nstring dnsZoneName = \"sample.com\";\nDnsZoneResource dnsZone = await dnsZoneCollection.GetAsync(dnsZoneName);\n// Enable DNSSEC on the zone\nDnssecConfigResource dnssecConfig = await dnsZone.GetDnssecConfig().CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed);\nConsole.WriteLine($\"DNSSEC enabled, provisioning state: {dnssecConfig.Data.ProvisioningState}\");\n` `` `\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n1. **Write the sample code** in a new test file at `sdk/dns/Azure.ResourceManager.Dns/tests/Samples/Sample3_ManagingDnssec.cs`\n\n   Use this structure (following the existing pattern in `Sample1_ManagingDnsZones.cs`):\n\n   ```csharp\n   // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n   // Licensed under the MIT License.\n\n   using System;\n   using System.Threading.Tasks;\n   using Azure.Identity;\n   using Azure.ResourceManager;\n   using Azure.ResourceManager.Dns;\n   using Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\n   using NUnit.Framework;\n\n   namespace Azure.ResourceManager.Dns.Tests.Samples\n   {\n       public class Sample3_ManagingDnssec\n       {\n           [Test]\n           [Ignore(\"Only verifying that the sample builds\")]\n           public async Task EnableDnssec()\n           {\n               #region Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\n               ArmClient armClient = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\n               SubscriptionResource subscription = await armClient.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\n               string rgName = \"myRgName\";\n               ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(rgName);\n               DnsZoneCollection dnsZoneCollection = resourceGroup.GetDnsZones();\n               string dnsZoneName = \"sample.com\";\n               DnsZoneResource dnsZone = await dnsZoneCollection.GetAsync(dnsZoneName);\n               // Enable DNSSEC on the zone — creates or updates the DnssecConfig child resource\n               DnssecConfigResource dnssecConfig = (await dnsZone.GetDnssecConfig().CreateOrUpdateAsync(WaitUntil.Completed)).Value;\n               Console.WriteLine($\"DNSSEC enabled, provisioning state: {dnssecConfig.Data.ProvisioningState}\");\n               #endregion Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\n           }\n       }\n   }\n   ```\n\n2. **Add placeholder in README** at the location described in Step 1 (after `### Delete a Dns zone`):\n\n   ````markdown\n   ### Enable DNSSEC on a DNS zone\n\n   ```C# Snippet:Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable\n   ```\n   ````\n\n   `\u003cSnippetName\u003e`: `Managing_DnssecConfig_Enable`\n\n### Step 3:
